snapshot_metadata.note: A discovery-INERT tier:pro pack with SENTINEL codes + a NET-NEW floors.py suppress executor (fixture_suppress). Proves (A2) the load-time tier gate is non-vacuous — under LITHRIM_BENCH_PACK=_plugin_fixture + LITHRIM_BENCH_LICENSE=deny-all the pack does NOT load (PackLicenseError; absent, not stubbed) — and (A4) open/closed — under the permit-all default its fixture_suppress registers in grounding.suppress_executors()/contract_plugins() with ZERO engine edits. INERT in normal use: pack discovery is active-pack-only, so nothing loads this pack unless LITHRIM_BENCH_PACK selects it.
